title: eg-enforce Reviewer Findings
description: The contract a review subagent returns. Subagents identify findings only. enforce.py assigns enforcement_level, next_step, override consumption, and gate.

type.description: Layer A: quality type from enforcement.yml `quality`. Layer B: governance type from enforcement.yml `governance`. enforce.py rejects unknown types.

artifactRef.description: Governance findings: violated artifact id (BDD-NNN#scenario-slug / ADR-NNNN / AT-NNN). Quality findings: null.

ruleRef.description: Rule source for the finding: QUALITY-RULES.md anchor, selected spec section, ADR/BDD/CONTEXT section, or handoff entry.

evidence.description: Concrete observation from the diff. For design-depth-regression include Interface burden, Hidden complexity, and Why net complexity increased.

impact.description: Why this finding matters: behavioral, data, security, maintainability, operability, or test-confidence risk.

location.description: file:line, or file when no line is available.

humanVerify.description: True when a human should manually verify this even if no automated test failed.
